title: My DIY Hot Glue Gun with 100x 7MM Glue Gun Sticks & Built-in Safety Stand Fast Heating DIY Glue Gun Anti Drip Nozzle Mini Melt Gun for Crafting, Art, Sealing, Home Repairs 10W Energy Efficient

features: Quick Heat for Instant Crafting: Our MY DIY Hot Glue Gun is a crafting essential. With fast 10W heating, it's ready to use in no time. Dive into your creative projects without delay and enjoy hassle-free crafting.

Precision Application, No Mess: Say goodbye to messy spills and uneven gluing. The anti-drip nozzle ensures you can apply glue with pinpoint accuracy. Your projects will look cleaner and more professional, making crafting a breeze.

Safety Stand for Peace of Mind: We've included a built-in safety stand to keep your glue gun secure and upright when not in use. Craft with peace of mind, knowing you have a safe and convenient place to rest your hot glue gun.

100 Glue Sticks Included: To fuel your creativity, we've included a whopping 100 adhesive glue sticks (7mm). That's plenty to complete your DIY crafts, home repairs, art projects, and more. Let your imagination run wild!

Ergonomic Design for Comfort: Crafting should be comfortable, and our glue gun's ergonomic design ensures just that. Whether you're sealing, repairing, or crafting, you'll appreciate the user-friendly design. It's the perfect tool for all your creative endeavors.
